document.docAuthor: Zhou, Ya-Dong, Mwachala, Geoffrey, Hu, Guang-Wan & Wang, Qing-Feng
document.docTitle: Ophioglossum vulgatum subsp. africanum J. E. Burrows
document.masterDocTitle: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

subSubSection.paragraph:
Ophioglossum vulgatum L. subsp. africanum J.E.Burrows
—
Habitat: UMWF; up to 3 300 m. Distribution: II.
Voucher: Castle Forest Station, Alt. 2 080 m, 30 Nov. 1971, Faden et al. 71/901 (EA).
